en: Now Adam knew Eve his wife, and she conceived and bore Cain, saying, "I have gotten a man with the help of the LORD."
zh: 亞當和他的妻子夏娃同房，夏娃就懷孕，生了該隱，就說：“藉著耶和華的幫助，我得了一個男兒。”

en: And again, she bore his brother Abel. Now Abel was a keeper of sheep, and Cain a worker of the ground.
zh: 她又生了該隱的弟弟亞伯。亞伯是牧羊的，該隱是種地的。

en: In the course of time Cain brought to the LORD an offering of the fruit of the ground,
zh: 有一天，該隱把地裡的出產拿來，當作禮物獻給耶和華。

en: and Abel also brought of the firstborn of his flock and of their fat portions. And the LORD had regard for Abel and his offering,
zh: 亞伯也把自己羊群中一些頭生的，和羊的脂油拿來獻上。耶和華看中了亞伯和他的禮物；

en: but for Cain and his offering he had no regard. So Cain was very angry, and his face fell.
zh: 只是沒有看中該隱和他的禮物。該隱就非常忿怒，垂頭喪氣。

en: The LORD said to Cain, "Why are you angry, and why has your face fallen?
zh: 耶和華對該隱說：“你為甚麼忿怒呢？你為甚麼垂頭喪氣呢？

en: If you do well, will you not be accepted? And if you do not do well, sin is crouching at the door. Its desire is for you, but you must rule over it."
zh: 你若行得好，豈不可以抬起頭來嗎？你若行得不好，罪就伏在門口了；它要纏住你，你卻要制伏它。”

en: Cain spoke to Abel his brother. And when they were in the field, Cain rose up against his brother Abel and killed him.
zh: 該隱對他的弟弟亞伯說：“我們到田間去吧。” ，該隱就起來襲擊他的弟弟亞伯，把他殺了。

en: Then the LORD said to Cain, "Where is Abel your brother?" He said, "I do not know; am I my brother's keeper?"
zh: 耶和華問該隱：“你的弟弟亞伯在哪裡？”他回答：“我不知道；難道我是看守我弟弟的嗎？”

en: And the LORD said, "What have you done? The voice of your brother's blood is crying to me from the ground.
zh: 耶和華說：“你作了甚麼事呢？你弟弟的血有聲音從地裡向我呼叫。

en: And now you are cursed from the ground, which has opened its mouth to receive your brother's blood from your hand.
zh: 地開了口，從你手裡接受了你弟弟的血，現在你要從這地受咒詛。

en: When you work the ground, it shall no longer yield to you its strength. You shall be a fugitive and a wanderer on the earth."
zh: 你種地，地也不再給你效力；你必在地上流離失所。”

en: Cain said to the LORD, "My punishment is greater than I can bear.
zh: 該隱對耶和華說：“我的刑罰太重，過於我所能擔當。

en: Behold, you have driven me today away from the ground, and from your face I shall be hidden. I shall be a fugitive and a wanderer on the earth, and whoever finds me will kill me."
zh: 看哪，今日你趕逐我離開這地，以致我要躲避你的面；我必在地上流離失所，遇見我的，都要殺我。”

en: Then the LORD said to him, "Not so! If anyone kills Cain, vengeance shall be taken on him sevenfold." And the LORD put a mark on Cain, lest any who found him should attack him.
zh: 耶和華對該隱說：“絕不會這樣，殺該隱的，必遭報七倍。”耶和華就給該隱立了一個記號，免得遇見他的人擊殺他。

en: Then Cain went away from the presence of the LORD and settled in the land of Nod, east of Eden.
zh: 於是該隱從耶和華面前出去，住在伊甸東邊的挪得地。

en: Cain knew his wife, and she conceived and bore Enoch. When he built a city, he called the name of the city after the name of his son, Enoch.
zh: 該隱和妻子同房，她就懷孕，生了以諾。該隱建造了一座城，就按著他兒子的名，給那城叫作以諾。

en: To Enoch was born Irad, and Irad fathered Mehujael, and Mehujael fathered Methushael, and Methushael fathered Lamech.
zh: 以諾生以拿，以拿生米戶雅利，米戶雅利生瑪土撒利，瑪土撒利生拉麥。

en: And Lamech took two wives. The name of the one was Adah, and the name of the other Zillah.
zh: 拉麥娶了兩個妻子，一個名叫亞大，另一個名叫洗拉。

en: Adah bore Jabal; he was the father of those who dwell in tents and have livestock.
zh: 亞大生雅八，雅八就是居住帳棚、牧養牲畜的人的鼻祖。

en: His brother's name was Jubal; he was the father of all those who play the lyre and pipe.
zh: 雅八的兄弟名叫猶八；猶八是所有彈琴吹簫的人的鼻祖。

en: Zillah also bore Tubal-cain; he was the forger of all instruments of bronze and iron. The sister of Tubal-cain was Naamah.
zh: 洗拉也生了土八．該隱，就是打造各種銅鐵器具的匠人；土八．該隱的妹妹是拿瑪。

en: Lamech said to his wives: "Adah and Zillah, hear my voice; you wives of Lamech, listen to what I say: I have killed a man for wounding me, a young man for striking me.
zh: 拉麥對他的兩個妻子說： “亞大和洗拉，要聽我的聲音； 拉麥的妻子，聆聽我的話： 壯年人傷我，我必殺他； 青年人損我，我必害他；

en: If Cain's revenge is sevenfold, then Lamech's is seventy-sevenfold."
zh: 人若殺該隱，要遭報七倍； 人若殺拉麥，必遭報七十七倍！”

en: And Adam knew his wife again, and she bore a son and called his name Seth, for she said, "God has appointed for me another offspring instead of Abel, for Cain killed him."
zh: 亞當又和妻子同房，她就生了一個兒子，給他起名叫塞特，因為她說：“ 神給我立了另一個後裔代替亞伯，因為該隱殺了他。”

en: To Seth also a son was born, and he called his name Enosh. At that time people began to call upon the name of the LORD.
zh: 塞特也生了一個兒子，就給他起名叫以挪士。那時人才開始呼求耶和華的名。
